calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lewis Gillian #12355.

Petitioners Vap Chie Fung and Pik Wing Wong (parents) were present in pro peras guardian ad litem for the Minor Ka Yu Fung, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Marco Ka Yu Fung.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
